title: Add explicit typed validator for memory manifest TOML
goal: Implement #504 by making the existing memory manifest validation an explicit typed-validator contract.
Update structured-file inventory so memory manifests are no longer routed as freeform-prohibited gaps.
non_goals: Do not convert memory notes themselves into fully structured records.
Do not add a separate schema language when the memory package already owns a typed validator.
Do not require host repos to use GitHub or any repo-specific tracker.

intent.outcome: memory manifest TOML is typed-validator-backed and invalid manifest shape produces actionable diagnostics
intent.constraints: repo/tool/language agnostic; prefer existing doctor/report/check paths; keep prose note edits possible when manifest metadata is valid
intent.latitude: may update memory manifest loader/validator, doctor tests, structured-file inventory, and planning state
intent.escalation: stop if the slice needs a new top-level command or a rigid note-content schema

execution.next_step: archive this slice and continue the remaining structured-file contract issues

invariants: memory manifest remains TOML and package-owned
doctor/report validation remains optional package behavior, not startup burden
structured files must not stay freeform once validation exists

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: all machine-readable files are schema-backed, typed-validator-backed, generated/derived, or explicitly diagnostic

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete the bounded #504 slice by making memory manifests explicitly typed-validator-backed.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Preserve package boundaries, keep validation behind doctor/check paths, avoid GitHub-specific shipped behavior, and keep #502 open for remaining children.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Implementation shape, focused tests, docs wording, inventory status text, and proof breadth.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A separate schema language, new top-level command, or rigid note-content schema becomes necessary.

active_milestone.scope: memory manifest typed validator and inventory status

validation_commands: cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q -k manifest
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules memory --format json
completion_criteria: Invalid memory manifest TOML or table shape produces doctor diagnostics.
Existing note metadata, improvement-signal fields, and durable facts are covered by explicit typed validation.
Structured-file inventory marks memory manifests typed-validator-backed.
#504 is closed and #502 remains open for the remaining child issues.

signals found: Subagent and proof routing reduced discovery work; active execplan projection gaps remain covered by #515.
signals fixed: Memory manifest entries now advertise concrete typed-validator backing instead of a routed gap.
signals routed: #515 remains the owner for projection-complete execplan scaffolds.
signals dismissed: No new generic issue was created for this slice; the remaining structured-file proof hardening stays under #502 child work.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Add explicit typed validator for memory manifest TOML
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #504 landed explicit memory manifest typed validation, doctor diagnostics for invalid TOML and shape drift, metadata contract docs, inventory status updates, and focused tests.
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #505/#506/#508/#509 remain open under #502 for the remaining structured-file contract work.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded #504 slice is complete while parent #502 remains open for the remaining child issues.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_check_memory_freshness.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/memory && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules memory --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <changed paths> --format json
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #504 only if invalid memory manifest TOML/shape no longer produces memory-manifest diagnostics or manifest inventory entries regress to freeform-prohibited-gap.

durable_residue.learned constraint: No future-relevant learning was identified beyond the archived proof record.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Memory manifests now have explicit typed shape validation, doctor diagnostics for malformed manifest data, updated metadata-contract docs, and typed-validator-backed structured-file inventory entries.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Workspace CLI tests, memory package installer/freshness tests, ruff checks, structured-file inventory check, contract tooling check, memory doctor, planning doctor, and proof selection all passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archive evidence is enough; no Memory promotion needed beyond the existing metadata contract updates.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Memory metadata contract docs were updated in the root installed surface and memory bootstrap payload.
execution_summary.resume from: Refresh external evidence, continue structured-file-contract at #505 unless reprioritized.
